label: Note
summary: A yellow sticky note with a hard shadow, for asides and webmaster's notes.
era: The yellow "webmaster's note" box wedged into every 1999 update log, apologizing for the guestbook again.

classes.name: rs-note
classes.role: sticky note: #FFFF99 bg, olive border, hard 2px shadow

a11y: Just styled content; mark it up as an <aside> when it truly is one. No role required.
